languages.text: Газовые плантации собирают миллиарды тонн органического сырья и обрабатывают выделяющийся в процессе их разложения углеводородный газ.

traits.locale_text: Газовые плантации собирают миллиарды тонн органического сырья и обрабатывают выделяющийся в процессе их разложения углеводородный газ.
Газовые плантации собирают миллиарды тонн органического сырья и обрабатывают выделяющийся в процессе их разложения углеводородный газ.

languages.text: The gas fundi collect billions of tons of raw organic matter and process the hydrocarbon gas which is released during decomposition.
languages.original_text: Газовые плантации собирают миллиарды тонн органического сырья и обрабатывают выделяющийся в процессе их разложения углеводородный газ.

traits.locale_text: Billions of tons of raw organic matter is collected here. As they decay they produce a carbon based gas which is collected, filtered and processed.
Billions of tons of raw organic matter is collected here. As they decay they produce a carbon based gas which is collected, filtered and processed.
The gas fundi collect billions of tons of raw organic matter and process the hydrocarbon gas which is released during decomposition.
The gas fundi collect billions of tons of raw organic matter and process the hydrocarbon gas which is released during decomposition.
The gas fundi collect billions of tons of raw organic matter and process the hydrocarbon gas which is released during decomposition.
The gas fundi collect billions of tons of raw organic matter and process the hydrocarbon gas which is released during decomposition.

languages.text: Die Gasfonds sammeln Milliarden von Tonnen organischer Rohstoffe und verarbeiten das bei der Zersetzung freigesetzte Kohlenwasserstoffgas.
languages.original_text: The gas fundi collect billions of tons of raw organic matter and process the hydrocarbon gas which is released during decomposition.

traits.locale_text: Die Gasfonds sammeln Milliarden von Tonnen organischer Rohstoffe und verarbeiten das bei der Zersetzung freigesetzte Kohlenwasserstoffgas.

languages.text: Les fonds gaziers collectent des milliards de tonnes de matières organiques brutes et traitent les hydrocarbures gazeux qui se dégagent lors de la décomposition.
languages.original_text: The gas fundi collect billions of tons of raw organic matter and process the hydrocarbon gas which is released during decomposition.

traits.locale_text: Les fonds gaziers collectent des milliards de tonnes de matières organiques brutes et traitent les hydrocarbures gazeux qui se dégagent lors de la décomposition.

languages.text: Los fundi de gas recogen miles de millones de toneladas de materia orgánica bruta y procesan el gas hidrocarburo que se libera durante la descomposición.
languages.original_text: The gas fundi collect billions of tons of raw organic matter and process the hydrocarbon gas which is released during decomposition.

traits.locale_text: Los fundi de gas recogen miles de millones de toneladas de materia orgánica bruta y procesan el gas hidrocarburo que se libera durante la descomposición.

languages.text: Gaz fundi milyarlarca ton ham organik maddeyi toplar ve ayrışma sırasında açığa çıkan hidrokarbon gazını işler.
languages.original_text: The gas fundi collect billions of tons of raw organic matter and process the hydrocarbon gas which is released during decomposition.

traits.locale_text: Gaz fundi milyarlarca ton ham organik maddeyi toplar ve ayrışma sırasında açığa çıkan hidrokarbon gazını işler.
